listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #399
listings.description: 24-hour Pilot Travel Center at I-65 Exit 105 (KY-61) in Lebanon Junction, Bullitt County. Diesel (8 diesel lanes), showers, convenience store, Subway and McDonald's, CAT Scale on site, DEF, laundry, game room, and truck service bays. Reported truck-space count varies by source, so left blank pending confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Official Pilot location page (150 Plaza Park Rd, Lebanon Junction 40150), truckstopsandservices (Pilot #399, I-65 Exit 105), findtruckservice (Pilot #399, phone 502-833-2727), and Kentucky interstate logos (Pilot at I-65 Exit 105 / KY-61) all agree on identity, exit, and city. CAT Scale, Subway, McDonald's, and 8 diesel lanes reported by multiple directories. Official brand page (loves.com/pilotflyingj.com) blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT), so identity was corroborated via independent directories.

listings.name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #399, Lebanon Junction
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at the Pilot Travel Center #399 at I-65 Exit 105 (KY-61), Lebanon Junction, Bullitt County.
listings.corroboration: Multiple independent directories list CAT Scales among the amenities of Pilot #399 at I-65 Exit 105, Lebanon Junction. The official catscale.com locator was blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT); CAT Scale presence corroborated by >=2 independent directory listings.

listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #238
listings.description: 24-hour Love's Travel Stop #238 at I-65 Exit 116 (KY-480/Blue Lick-Cedar Grove Rd) in Shepherdsville, Bullitt County. Diesel, showers, convenience store, Subway and Chester's, CAT Scale, DEF, EV charging, and a co-located Love's Truck Care service center (listed separately). Reported truck-space count varies by source (88 vs 120), so left blank pending confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Search snippets from the official Love's #238 page, truckstopsandservices (Love's #238, I-65 Exit 116), Yelp, and RV Parky all confirm 1090 Cedar Grove Rd, Shepherdsville 40165, store #238, phone 502-543-7000, Exit 116. Official loves.com page blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT); corroborated via independent directories.

listings.name: CAT Scale - Love's Travel Stop #238, Shepherdsville
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Love's Travel Stop #238 at I-65 Exit 116, Shepherdsville, Bullitt County.
listings.corroboration: truckstopsandservices, 4RoadService, and Chamber of Commerce directory all list a CAT Scale at the Love's #238 / I-65 Exit 116 Shepherdsville location (phone 502-543-7000). Official catscale.com locator blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT).

listings.name: Love's Truck Care #238
listings.description: 24/7 Love's Truck Care full-service truck maintenance and tire center co-located at Love's Travel Stop #238, I-65 Exit 116, Shepherdsville. Services include oil/PM changes, light mechanical repair, new tires and mobile/roadside tire service, computer diagnostics, and trailer repair.
listings.corroboration: Find Truck Service (Love's Truck Care #238, Shepherdsville, 800-655-6837), TruckDown, and NTTR Directory all confirm a Love's Truck Care heavy-duty service/tire center co-located with Love's #238 at 1090 Cedar Grove Rd, I-65 Exit 116, offering tire and mechanical services. Listed as a distinct co-located service per the co-location model.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #356
listings.description: 24-hour Pilot Travel Center #356 at I-65 Exit 116 (KY-480/E Blue Lick Rd) in Shepherdsville, Bullitt County. Diesel (7 fuel lanes), 6 showers, convenience store, Subway on site with Taco Bell and Waffle House adjacent, and a CAT Scale. Reported truck-space count varies by source (60 vs 90), so left blank pending confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Official Pilot location page, truckstopsandservices (Pilot #356), Find Truck Service (Pilot #356, phone 502-955-5049), and TruckMap all confirm 2050 E Blue Lick Rd, Shepherdsville 40165, store #356, with a CAT Scale. Exit is corroborated as I-65 Exit 116 (KY-480/Blue Lick Rd) by roadnow/iExit exit lists; one directory's 'Exit 121' label is inconsistent with the KY exit sequence and was not used. Official brand page blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT).

listings.name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #356, Shepherdsville
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #356 at I-65 Exit 116, Shepherdsville, Bullitt County.
listings.corroboration: truckstopsandservices and Find Truck Service both list a CAT Scale at Pilot #356, 2050 E Blue Lick Rd, I-65 Exit 116, Shepherdsville. Official catscale.com locator blocked at the org egress proxy (403 CONNECT).

listings.name: All American Truck Wash
listings.description: Standalone truck/trailer wash on Cedar Grove Rd at I-65 Exit 116 in Shepherdsville, adjacent to Love's Travel Stop #238. Semi and trailer washing.
listings.corroboration: Yellowpages (All American Truck Wash, 1116 Cedar Grove Rd, Shepherdsville 40165, 502-543-1911) and Find Truck Service / Allstays truck-wash directories both list a truck/trailer wash at I-65 Exit 116, 1116 Cedar Grove Rd. Name appears as 'All American Truck Wash' (yellowpages) / 'All American-Pride Truck Wash' (findtruckservice); primary name used from yellowpages.

listings.name: Bullitt County Welcome Center (I-65 Southbound, MM 114) - truck parking
listings.description: Kentucky (KYTC) Welcome Center / rest area on I-65 southbound at approximately mile marker 114 in Bullitt County (Shepherdsville area), with separate truck and passenger parking, restrooms, vending, and picnic area. Held pending confirmation of legal overnight truck parking status.
listings.hold_reason: Direction (SB) and MM 114 confirmed by KYTC welcome-center documentation, and separate truck parking is present, but LEGAL overnight parking status is not independently confirmed (never assumed from truck-space presence). Exact street address/zip not confirmed. Held per conservative rest-area/welcome-center rules.
listings.corroboration: KYTC Welcome Center ADA document and kentuckyrestareas.com both confirm a Bullitt County I-65 Welcome Center, southbound, mile marker 114, with separate truck/passenger parking and phone 502-543-5900. Overnight legality unconfirmed, so held.

listings.name: I-65 Bullitt County Weigh Station (KVE/KSP)
listings.description: Reported Kentucky State Police / Commercial Vehicle Enforcement (KVE) weigh station on I-65 in the Bullitt County / Shepherdsville area. Held pending independent confirmation of exact location, direction, mile marker, and operating status.
listings.hold_reason: Existence of an I-65 Bullitt County weigh/scale facility is asserted by directory sources, but direction (NB/SB), mile marker/exact location, and permanent-vs-mobile/inspection-only status could not be independently confirmed from KYTC/KSP. Note: the MM-114 facility is a KYTC Welcome Center, not a weigh station; the nearest confirmed permanent KSP scale (Post 3 / Elizabethtown, MM ~89.5, Hardin County) is south of this segment. Held per conservative weigh-station rules.
listings.corroboration: coopsareopen and kentuckytruckingonline reference an I-65 weigh station in the Bullitt County/Shepherdsville area, but neither provided a confirmable direction, mile marker, or status; KSP CVE operates KY weigh stations. Insufficient to publish.

excluded.name: Rooster Run General Store / Travel Plaza
excluded.reason: Located at 6515 New Shepherdsville Rd, Coxs Creek 40013 (Nelson County), roughly 9-10 miles east of I-65 Exit 112 on KY-245; primarily serves KY-245/Bardstown traffic rather than the I-65 exit itself. Off-corridor for this I-65 segment.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash (Sonora)
excluded.reason: At I-65 Exit 81 (Sonora, Hardin County), south of this segment's exit 94-117 range.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash (Glendale)
excluded.reason: At I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale, Hardin County), south of this segment's exit 94-117 range.

excluded.name: Best Western Shepherdsville
excluded.reason: At I-65 Exit 117; advertises free auto parking but truck/big-rig parking not independently confirmed. Excluded from 'Hotels with Truck Parking' to avoid unverified truck-access claim.

excluded.name: 105 Quick Stop
excluded.reason: Reported small fuel/convenience stop near I-65 Exit 105 (12492 S Preston Hwy); could not independently confirm truck-stop category-fit, truck parking, or operating status. Excluded pending confirmation.

excluded.name: Radcliff / Vine Grove / West Point truck facilities
excluded.reason: Radcliff and Vine Grove sit west of I-65 near Fort Knox (served via KY-313 / Western Kentucky Parkway), and West Point is on US-31W - none are at an I-65 exit in this range with a verifiable I-65-adjacent truck/freight facility. No qualifying listings found.
